message: Proposed change 'ci-quality-gate-workflow' — the first thin vertical slice of phase gated-release-path-dry-run. Created .ratchet/changes/ci-quality-gate-workflow/ with .ratchet.yaml, features/ci/quality-gate-workflow.feature (Feature + 5 Scenarios covering: triggers on push & pull_request; job runs install->lint->test in order; failing lint goes red and blocks the release path; failing test goes red and blocks the release path; release path positioned after the green spine), and plan.md (Why/What/Design + 6-item ## Tasks checklist). Scope is the CI workflow skeleton only: .github/workflows/ci.yml (push+PR, checkout->install->lint->test) plus a reusable yaml workflow-parser and test/ci assertions of triggers and step ordering. Deliberately excludes the release-decision module and npm publish --dry-run, which are the next two phase-1 changes (release-decision-module, gated-dry-run-publish) that plug into this workflow's seam and reuse the parser. No implementation done — artifacts only, per the PROPOSE step.

Proposed change 'ci-quality-gate-workflow' — the first thin vertical slice of phase gated-release-path-dry-run. Created .ratchet/changes/ci-quality-gate-workflow/ with .ratchet.yaml, features/ci/quality-gate-workflow.feature (Feature + 5 Scenarios covering: triggers on push & pull_request; job runs install->lint->test in order; failing lint goes red and blocks the release path; failing test goes red and blocks the release path; release path positioned after the green spine), and plan.md (Why/What/Design + 6-item ## Tasks checklist). Scope is the CI workflow skeleton only: .github/workflows/ci.yml (push+PR, checkout->install->lint->test) plus a reusable yaml workflow-parser and test/ci assertions of triggers and step ordering. Deliberately excludes the release-decision module and npm publish --dry-run, which are the next two phase-1 changes (release-decision-module, gated-dry-run-publish) that plug into this workflow's seam and reuse the parser. No implementation done — artifacts only, per the PROPOSE step.
Read plan + feature. Creating ci.yml workflow, workflow-parsing helper, and test/ci tests.

Shipped the CI quality-gate workflow skeleton. Added .github/workflows/ci.yml (on: [push, pull_request]) with a single job: checkout -> setup pnpm -> setup Node -> pnpm install --frozen-lockfile -> pnpm lint -> pnpm vitest run, in that order; red lint/test blocks downstream via Actions' default success() condition. Left a clearly-commented RELEASE PATH SEAM after the test step for the later release-decision-module gate and gated-dry-run-publish step — no publish step added here. Added a reusable workflow parser at test/ci/helpers/workflow.ts (uses existing yaml dep) exposing normalized triggers, jobs, and ordered steps plus findRunStepIndex/findUsesStepIndex for index-based ordering assertions; designed for reuse by the next two changes. Added test/ci/quality-gate-workflow.test.ts (9 tests) asserting push+pull_request triggers, checkout-before-package-steps, install->lint->test relative ordering, that any release/publish step sits after the spine, and that no real (non-dry-run) npm publish exists. Proof-of-work: 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' passes (lint clean, 9/9 tests, exit 0). No agent-specific branching; helper kept under test/ so it stays out of the shipped package.

Shipped the CI quality-gate workflow skeleton. Added .github/workflows/ci.yml (on: [push, pull_request]) with a single job: checkout -> setup pnpm -> setup Node -> pnpm install --frozen-lockfile -> pnpm lint -> pnpm vitest run, in that order; red lint/test blocks downstream via Actions' default success() condition. Left a clearly-commented RELEASE PATH SEAM after the test step for the later release-decision-module gate and gated-dry-run-publish step — no publish step added here. Added a reusable workflow parser at test/ci/helpers/workflow.ts (uses existing yaml dep) exposing normalized triggers, jobs, and ordered steps plus findRunStepIndex/findUsesStepIndex for index-based ordering assertions; designed for reuse by the next two changes. Added test/ci/quality-gate-workflow.test.ts (9 tests) asserting push+pull_request triggers, checkout-before-package-steps, install->lint->test relative ordering, that any release/publish step sits after the spine, and that no real (non-dry-run) npm publish exists. Proof-of-work: 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' passes (lint clean, 9/9 tests, exit 0). No agent-specific branching; helper kept under test/ so it stays out of the shipped package.
Proposing release-decision-module: scoping the unit-tested ALLOW/DENY spine (branch==main AND all wired gates green) as the second thin slice of phase gated-release-path-dry-run.

Proposed change release-decision-module (PROPOSE only — no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/release-decision-module/ with .ratchet.yaml, features/ci/release-decision.feature (8 scenarios: DENY on non-main even when all-green, DENY on main when lint red, when test red, both-red reporting both, ALLOW only on green main, fail-closed DENY on missing signal, and an extra wired gate must be green), and plan.md with Design + a 9-item ## Tasks checklist. Vertical slice: a pure, unit-tested decideRelease() module in src/core/ci/ returning {allowed,reasons} — ALLOW iff branch==main AND every wired gate (lint+test, data-driven/extensible) is green, fail-closed otherwise; tests under test/ci/ so 'pnpm vitest run test/ci' covers them. Scoped to the decision spine only — does NOT touch .github/workflows/ci.yml or add a publish step; workflow wiring + npm publish --dry-run belong to the next change gated-dry-run-publish.

Proposed change release-decision-module (PROPOSE only — no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/release-decision-module/ with .ratchet.yaml, features/ci/release-decision.feature (8 scenarios: DENY on non-main even when all-green, DENY on main when lint red, when test red, both-red reporting both, ALLOW only on green main, fail-closed DENY on missing signal, and an extra wired gate must be green), and plan.md with Design + a 9-item ## Tasks checklist. Vertical slice: a pure, unit-tested decideRelease() module in src/core/ci/ returning {allowed,reasons} — ALLOW iff branch==main AND every wired gate (lint+test, data-driven/extensible) is green, fail-closed otherwise; tests under test/ci/ so 'pnpm vitest run test/ci' covers them. Scoped to the decision spine only — does NOT touch .github/workflows/ci.yml or add a publish step; workflow wiring + npm publish --dry-run belong to the next change gated-dry-run-publish.
Read plan + feature; creating pure release-decision module under src/core/ci and unit tests under test/ci

Added pure, fail-closed release-decision module at src/core/ci/release-decision.ts: decideRelease(input) returns {allowed, outcome (ALLOW/DENY), reasons[]}, ALLOW iff branch==='main' AND every wired gate (keys of the data-driven gates record) is explicitly green; non-main branch, red, or missing/unknown signal accumulates a precise per-failure reason. Added test/ci/release-decision.test.ts covering all 7 feature scenarios: DENY non-main even all-green, DENY lint red, DENY test red, DENY both-red reporting both, ALLOW only on green main, fail-closed DENY on missing test signal, and extensibility (extra 'coverage' gate must also be green). Proof-of-work 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' passes: lint clean, 16 tests green. Did NOT modify .github/workflows/ci.yml and added no publish step — workflow wiring + npm publish --dry-run belong to gated-dry-run-publish. All 9 plan task boxes checked.

Added pure, fail-closed release-decision module at src/core/ci/release-decision.ts: decideRelease(input) returns {allowed, outcome (ALLOW/DENY), reasons[]}, ALLOW iff branch==='main' AND every wired gate (keys of the data-driven gates record) is explicitly green; non-main branch, red, or missing/unknown signal accumulates a precise per-failure reason. Added test/ci/release-decision.test.ts covering all 7 feature scenarios: DENY non-main even all-green, DENY lint red, DENY test red, DENY both-red reporting both, ALLOW only on green main, fail-closed DENY on missing test signal, and extensibility (extra 'coverage' gate must also be green). Proof-of-work 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' passes: lint clean, 16 tests green. Did NOT modify .github/workflows/ci.yml and added no publish step — workflow wiring + npm publish --dry-run belong to gated-dry-run-publish. All 9 plan task boxes checked.
Proposing final phase-1 slice: wiring the release-decision module into ci.yml behind a main-only gate ahead of npm publish --dry-run, with parser/runner tests. Authoring features + plan now.

Proposed the final phase-1 slice 'gated-dry-run-publish' (artifacts only, no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/gated-dry-run-publish/ with: .ratchet.yaml; two Gherkin features under features/ci/ — dry-run-publish-wiring.feature (parsed-workflow: spine preserved, main-only release-gate step consulting the release-decision module after the spine, npm publish --dry-run after the gate and main-only, never a bare npm publish, no token, release path after lint/test) and release-gate-runner.feature (a thin runner reads branch + lint/test signals from env, calls decideRelease, exits 0 on ALLOW / non-zero on DENY, fail-closed on missing signal); and plan.md with Why/What Changes/Design and a ## Tasks checklist of 8 - [ ] items. Vertical slice: fill the RELEASE PATH SEAM in .github/workflows/ci.yml by wiring the already-shipped release-decision module behind a main-only gate ahead of npm publish --dry-run via a logic-free adapter runner, plus parser-driven and runner-integration tests under test/ci so the phase proof 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' covers both the wiring shape and the gate behavior. Explicitly out of scope: real publish/token/versioning (phase 4) and coverage/e2e/security gates (phases 2-3).

Proposed the final phase-1 slice 'gated-dry-run-publish' (artifacts only, no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/gated-dry-run-publish/ with: .ratchet.yaml; two Gherkin features under features/ci/ — dry-run-publish-wiring.feature (parsed-workflow: spine preserved, main-only release-gate step consulting the release-decision module after the spine, npm publish --dry-run after the gate and main-only, never a bare npm publish, no token, release path after lint/test) and release-gate-runner.feature (a thin runner reads branch + lint/test signals from env, calls decideRelease, exits 0 on ALLOW / non-zero on DENY, fail-closed on missing signal); and plan.md with Why/What Changes/Design and a ## Tasks checklist of 8 - [ ] items. Vertical slice: fill the RELEASE PATH SEAM in .github/workflows/ci.yml by wiring the already-shipped release-decision module behind a main-only gate ahead of npm publish --dry-run via a logic-free adapter runner, plus parser-driven and runner-integration tests under test/ci so the phase proof 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' covers both the wiring shape and the gate behavior. Explicitly out of scope: real publish/token/versioning (phase 4) and coverage/e2e/security gates (phases 2-3).
Reviewed prior slices (workflow spine + parser helper + decideRelease module) and feature files. Implementing release-gate runner, wiring ci.yml seam, and the two test suites.

Wired the final phase-1 slice end to end. (1) Added src/core/ci/release-gate.ts: a thin, shippable runner that reads the branch (GITHUB_REF_NAME) and wired lint/test gate signals (GATE_LINT/GATE_TEST) from its environment, delegates entirely to decideRelease (no new decision logic), prints ALLOW/DENY with denial reasons, and exits 0 on ALLOW / non-zero on DENY; a direct-run guard makes it executable as 'node dist/core/ci/release-gate.js' without firing on import. (2) Filled the RELEASE PATH SEAM in .github/workflows/ci.yml: lint/test steps now carry ids; added a main-only (if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') release-gate step that builds and runs the runner with gate signals mapped from step outcomes, followed by a main-only 'npm publish --dry-run' step after the gate — no bare publish, no NODE_AUTH_TOKEN/secret. (3) Extended the parser helper's WorkflowStep with an optional normalized 'if' field. (4) Added test/ci/dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts (spine preserved; main-only gate after spine consulting the release-decision module; main-only dry-run publish after the gate; no bare publish; no token wiring with comments stripped) and test/ci/release-gate.test.ts (ALLOW+exit0 on green main; DENY+non-zero off main naming branch; DENY when test red naming gate; fail-closed DENY when a signal is missing). Checked off all 8 plan tasks. Proof-of-work 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' is green (exit 0, 32 tests pass); also verified the built runner's ALLOW/DENY exit behavior directly.

Wired the final phase-1 slice end to end. (1) Added src/core/ci/release-gate.ts: a thin, shippable runner that reads the branch (GITHUB_REF_NAME) and wired lint/test gate signals (GATE_LINT/GATE_TEST) from its environment, delegates entirely to decideRelease (no new decision logic), prints ALLOW/DENY with denial reasons, and exits 0 on ALLOW / non-zero on DENY; a direct-run guard makes it executable as 'node dist/core/ci/release-gate.js' without firing on import. (2) Filled the RELEASE PATH SEAM in .github/workflows/ci.yml: lint/test steps now carry ids; added a main-only (if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') release-gate step that builds and runs the runner with gate signals mapped from step outcomes, followed by a main-only 'npm publish --dry-run' step after the gate — no bare publish, no NODE_AUTH_TOKEN/secret. (3) Extended the parser helper's WorkflowStep with an optional normalized 'if' field. (4) Added test/ci/dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts (spine preserved; main-only gate after spine consulting the release-decision module; main-only dry-run publish after the gate; no bare publish; no token wiring with comments stripped) and test/ci/release-gate.test.ts (ALLOW+exit0 on green main; DENY+non-zero off main naming branch; DENY when test red naming gate; fail-closed DENY when a signal is missing). Checked off all 8 plan tasks. Proof-of-work 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' is green (exit 0, 32 tests pass); also verified the built runner's ALLOW/DENY exit behavior directly.

PROPOSE complete for coverage-threshold-gate (coverage slice of phase coverage-and-e2e-gates). Created .ratchet/changes/coverage-threshold-gate/ with two Gherkin features (features/ci/coverage-gate.feature, features/ci/coverage-ci-step.feature) and plan.md (## Tasks, 11 items). Thin vertical slice mirroring the phase-1 split: a PURE coverage evaluator (evaluateCoverage -> green/red against an enforced, configurable threshold, fail-closed on missing/malformed summary) plus a thin runner that adapts CI's env to it, vitest json-summary reporter, and a CI coverage step after 'test' that goes red below threshold. The signal is emitted in the release-decision GateSignal shape but deliberately NOT wired into decideRelease/WIRED_GATES — that and e2e are the sibling/after changes (e2e-cli-smoke, wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate). Publish path stays --dry-run. No tasks implemented in this step.

PROPOSE complete for coverage-threshold-gate (coverage slice of phase coverage-and-e2e-gates). Created .ratchet/changes/coverage-threshold-gate/ with two Gherkin features (features/ci/coverage-gate.feature, features/ci/coverage-ci-step.feature) and plan.md (## Tasks, 11 items). Thin vertical slice mirroring the phase-1 split: a PURE coverage evaluator (evaluateCoverage -> green/red against an enforced, configurable threshold, fail-closed on missing/malformed summary) plus a thin runner that adapts CI's env to it, vitest json-summary reporter, and a CI coverage step after 'test' that goes red below threshold. The signal is emitted in the release-decision GateSignal shape but deliberately NOT wired into decideRelease/WIRED_GATES — that and e2e are the sibling/after changes (e2e-cli-smoke, wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate). Publish path stays --dry-run. No tasks implemented in this step.

Implemented the coverage slice (Phase 2). Added pure evaluateCoverage in src/core/ci/coverage-gate.ts returning {signal:'green'|'red', coverage, threshold, reasons} reusing release-decision's GateSignal — green iff finite coverage >= threshold, else red with a precise reason (below-threshold or unreadable summary). Added DEFAULT_COVERAGE_THRESHOLD=68 (just below measured 68.67% line coverage) overridable via COVERAGE_THRESHOLD; a fail-closed json-summary reader (total.lines.pct, null on missing/malformed); and a thin runCoverageGate(env) runner that exits 0 on green / non-zero on red, mirroring release-gate.ts's isDirectRun. Extended vitest.config reporter with 'json-summary' (no vitest thresholds — enforcement lives in the tested runner). Added a CI 'Coverage gate' step in ci.yml after test and outside the release path (pnpm vitest run --coverage; pnpm build; node dist/core/ci/coverage-gate.js). Added test/ci/coverage-gate.test.ts covering evaluator branches, threshold override, fail-closed reads, runner exit codes, GateSignal type compatibility, and CI-step structure (coverage collection, gate after test, no GATE_COVERAGE on the release path). Verified: pnpm lint clean (0 errors), all 53 test/ci tests pass, and the built runner shows green@68.67%, red when forced below threshold, and fail-closed red on a missing summary. Scope held: NO WIRED_GATES change, NO GATE_COVERAGE wired into decideRelease, no e2e touched; publish path stays --dry-run. Those belong to e2e-cli-smoke and wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate.

Implemented the coverage slice (Phase 2). Added pure evaluateCoverage in src/core/ci/coverage-gate.ts returning {signal:'green'|'red', coverage, threshold, reasons} reusing release-decision's GateSignal — green iff finite coverage >= threshold, else red with a precise reason (below-threshold or unreadable summary). Added DEFAULT_COVERAGE_THRESHOLD=68 (just below measured 68.67% line coverage) overridable via COVERAGE_THRESHOLD; a fail-closed json-summary reader (total.lines.pct, null on missing/malformed); and a thin runCoverageGate(env) runner that exits 0 on green / non-zero on red, mirroring release-gate.ts's isDirectRun. Extended vitest.config reporter with 'json-summary' (no vitest thresholds — enforcement lives in the tested runner). Added a CI 'Coverage gate' step in ci.yml after test and outside the release path (pnpm vitest run --coverage; pnpm build; node dist/core/ci/coverage-gate.js). Added test/ci/coverage-gate.test.ts covering evaluator branches, threshold override, fail-closed reads, runner exit codes, GateSignal type compatibility, and CI-step structure (coverage collection, gate after test, no GATE_COVERAGE on the release path). Verified: pnpm lint clean (0 errors), all 53 test/ci tests pass, and the built runner shows green@68.67%, red when forced below threshold, and fail-closed red on a missing summary. Scope held: NO WIRED_GATES change, NO GATE_COVERAGE wired into decideRelease, no e2e touched; publish path stays --dry-run. Those belong to e2e-cli-smoke and wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate.

Proposing e2e-cli-smoke: studied batch manifest, the coverage-threshold-gate slice (pure evaluator + thin runner + CI step pattern), release-decision spine, CI workflow, and the built CLI (commander: --version/--help + subcommands via bin/ratchet.js). Writing features + plan now; mirroring the coverage slice split so e2e produces a gate signal but is NOT wired into decideRelease (that is wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate).

PROPOSE complete for e2e-cli-smoke (vertical-slice e2e half of phase coverage-and-e2e-gates). Created .ratchet/changes/e2e-cli-smoke/ with: features/e2e/cli-smoke.feature (7 scenarios: drive built bin/ratchet.js as a subprocess for --version/--help/a read-only subcommand, write a machine-readable result, pure evaluateE2e green/red, fail-closed on missing result, signal-shape matches release-decision but NOT yet wired) and features/ci/e2e-ci-step.feature (3 scenarios: CI builds the package + runs the smoke + an e2e-gate step after test that goes red on failure and does NOT touch the release path). plan.md has Why/What Changes/Design and a ## Tasks checklist (10 unchecked items). Scope mirrors the coverage slice: real signal-producer (subprocess smoke) + pure evaluator (src/core/ci/e2e-gate.ts) + thin runE2eGate runner + CI step, producing an 'e2e' GateSignal but deliberately NOT extending WIRED_GATES / adding GATE_E2E — that wiring and the phase-wide test/e2e/release-gate.sh belong to the after change wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate. Publish path stays --dry-run. No tasks implemented in this step.

PROPOSE complete for e2e-cli-smoke (vertical-slice e2e half of phase coverage-and-e2e-gates). Created .ratchet/changes/e2e-cli-smoke/ with: features/e2e/cli-smoke.feature (7 scenarios: drive built bin/ratchet.js as a subprocess for --version/--help/a read-only subcommand, write a machine-readable result, pure evaluateE2e green/red, fail-closed on missing result, signal-shape matches release-decision but NOT yet wired) and features/ci/e2e-ci-step.feature (3 scenarios: CI builds the package + runs the smoke + an e2e-gate step after test that goes red on failure and does NOT touch the release path). plan.md has Why/What Changes/Design and a ## Tasks checklist (10 unchecked items). Scope mirrors the coverage slice: real signal-producer (subprocess smoke) + pure evaluator (src/core/ci/e2e-gate.ts) + thin runE2eGate runner + CI step, producing an 'e2e' GateSignal but deliberately NOT extending WIRED_GATES / adding GATE_E2E — that wiring and the phase-wide test/e2e/release-gate.sh belong to the after change wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate. Publish path stays --dry-run. No tasks implemented in this step.

Reviewed plan + features + coverage-slice conventions; verified built CLI (--version=0.1.0, --help lists commands, init --tools none + list exit 0). Starting implementation: smoke script, e2e-gate module, CI step, tests.

Implemented the e2e slice (all plan tasks 1.1-5.2 checked). Added test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh: builds the package then drives the BUILT CLI as a subprocess (node bin/ratchet.js --version exits 0 + prints version; --help exits 0 + lists commands; init --tools none + list run end to end in a scratch dir), asserting exit code + stdout only — never importing internals. It writes a fail-closed, atomic machine-readable result (test/e2e/.results/cli-smoke.json: per-check name/passed + overall ok; {ok:false} placeholder laid down before checks so a crash can't leave a stale green). Added src/core/ci/e2e-gate.ts: pure evaluateE2e (green iff parsed AND ok AND no check failed, else red naming the failing check(s) / incomplete run / unreadable result), readE2eResult (null on missing/malformed/shape-mismatch -> fail-closed red), and thin runE2eGate(env) runner with isDirectRun(), reusing GateSignal from release-decision.ts. Added the e2e CI step to .github/workflows/ci.yml after test/coverage and outside the release path (pnpm build; bash test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh; node dist/core/ci/e2e-gate.js). Added test/ci/e2e-gate.test.ts (evaluator + reader + runner behavior incl. type-compat with GateSignal, plus structural CI-step assertions via the workflow helper: build step, smoke step, e2e-gate after test, and no GATE_E2E on the release path). Gitignored test/e2e/.results/. Verified: pnpm lint clean; pnpm vitest run test/ci => 71 passed; bash test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh => green; built runner exits 0 on green, 1 on a forced failed check, 1 fail-closed on missing result. SCOPE: produces the e2e signal only — NO WIRED_GATES change, NO GATE_E2E on the release path, release-decision/release-gate spine untouched, no release-gate.sh assembled, publish path still --dry-run; wiring belongs to wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate.

Implemented the e2e slice (all plan tasks 1.1-5.2 checked). Added test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh: builds the package then drives the BUILT CLI as a subprocess (node bin/ratchet.js --version exits 0 + prints version; --help exits 0 + lists commands; init --tools none + list run end to end in a scratch dir), asserting exit code + stdout only — never importing internals. It writes a fail-closed, atomic machine-readable result (test/e2e/.results/cli-smoke.json: per-check name/passed + overall ok; {ok:false} placeholder laid down before checks so a crash can't leave a stale green). Added src/core/ci/e2e-gate.ts: pure evaluateE2e (green iff parsed AND ok AND no check failed, else red naming the failing check(s) / incomplete run / unreadable result), readE2eResult (null on missing/malformed/shape-mismatch -> fail-closed red), and thin runE2eGate(env) runner with isDirectRun(), reusing GateSignal from release-decision.ts. Added the e2e CI step to .github/workflows/ci.yml after test/coverage and outside the release path (pnpm build; bash test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh; node dist/core/ci/e2e-gate.js). Added test/ci/e2e-gate.test.ts (evaluator + reader + runner behavior incl. type-compat with GateSignal, plus structural CI-step assertions via the workflow helper: build step, smoke step, e2e-gate after test, and no GATE_E2E on the release path). Gitignored test/e2e/.results/. Verified: pnpm lint clean; pnpm vitest run test/ci => 71 passed; bash test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh => green; built runner exits 0 on green, 1 on a forced failed check, 1 fail-closed on missing result. SCOPE: produces the e2e signal only — NO WIRED_GATES change, NO GATE_E2E on the release path, release-decision/release-gate spine untouched, no release-gate.sh assembled, publish path still --dry-run; wiring belongs to wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate.

Proposing: scoped a thin vertical slice — extend WIRED_GATES with coverage+e2e, pass GATE_COVERAGE/GATE_E2E into the release-gate step, add the phase proof harness test/e2e/release-gate.sh. Writing features + plan.

Proposed change wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate (vertical-slice, after coverage-threshold-gate + e2e-cli-smoke). Wrote .ratchet/changes/wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate/ with: features/ci/wire-release-gate.feature (6 scenarios: WIRED_GATES gains coverage+e2e, ALLOW only when lint+test+coverage+e2e green on main, DENY on coverage-red / e2e-red / missing signals, workflow feeds GATE_COVERAGE+GATE_E2E fail-closed, publish stays --dry-run), features/e2e/release-gate.feature (3 scenarios: green run stays ALLOW dry-run, forced coverage-below-threshold and forced failing e2e each flip to DENY), and plan.md with an 8-item Tasks checklist. The slice is data-only: extend WIRED_GATES to ['lint','test','coverage','e2e'] and pass the coverage/e2e step outcomes into the release-gate step (decideRelease unchanged), plus ship the phase proof harness test/e2e/release-gate.sh. Artifacts only — no implementation in this step.

Proposed change wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate (vertical-slice, after coverage-threshold-gate + e2e-cli-smoke). Wrote .ratchet/changes/wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate/ with: features/ci/wire-release-gate.feature (6 scenarios: WIRED_GATES gains coverage+e2e, ALLOW only when lint+test+coverage+e2e green on main, DENY on coverage-red / e2e-red / missing signals, workflow feeds GATE_COVERAGE+GATE_E2E fail-closed, publish stays --dry-run), features/e2e/release-gate.feature (3 scenarios: green run stays ALLOW dry-run, forced coverage-below-threshold and forced failing e2e each flip to DENY), and plan.md with an 8-item Tasks checklist. The slice is data-only: extend WIRED_GATES to ['lint','test','coverage','e2e'] and pass the coverage/e2e step outcomes into the release-gate step (decideRelease unchanged), plus ship the phase proof harness test/e2e/release-gate.sh. Artifacts only — no implementation in this step.
Starting: read plan + all gate modules/tests/workflow. Implementing WIRED_GATES extension, workflow env wiring, tests, and the release-gate.sh proof harness.

Wired the coverage and e2e signals into the release decision. (1.1) Extended WIRED_GATES in src/core/ci/release-gate.ts to ['lint','test','coverage','e2e']; decideRelease in release-decision.ts is UNCHANGED (the wired-gate set is data — the keys of the gates record). (1.2) Added GATE_COVERAGE/GATE_E2E to the release-gate step env in .github/workflows/ci.yml, each sourced from its step outcome and fail-closed to 'red'; refreshed the now-stale coverage/e2e step comments; the npm publish --dry-run step is unchanged. (2.1) Expanded test/ci/release-gate.test.ts: ALLOW requires all four gates green on main; DENY (with matching reason) when coverage red, e2e red, and fail-closed DENY when coverage or e2e signal is missing. (2.2) Extended test/ci/helpers/workflow.ts to capture step env and added structural assertions in dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts that the gate step wires GATE_COVERAGE/GATE_E2E from steps.coverage/e2e.outcome alongside lint/test, publish still --dry-run. Flipped the two now-obsolete boundary tests (coverage-gate.test.ts, e2e-gate.test.ts) from 'NOT wired' to asserting the signals ARE wired. (3.1/3.2) Added test/e2e/release-gate.sh (set -euo pipefail, scratch workdir + trap, per-check logging): builds, drives the built CLI via cli-smoke.sh, composes coverage-gate.js/e2e-gate.js/release-gate.js exactly like the CI release path, and asserts (a) all-green main -> ALLOW + dry-run publish path exercised, (b) forced below-threshold coverage summary -> coverage red -> DENY + no publish, (c) forced {ok:false} e2e result -> e2e red -> DENY + no publish. Verification (4.1): pnpm lint OK, pnpm vitest run test/ci = 77 passed/0 failed, bash test/e2e/release-gate.sh PASS. Scope (4.2): only WIRED_GATES + workflow env + proof harness changed; decideRelease core logic untouched, publish stays --dry-run, security gate (phase 3) out of scope.
